zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie de Lannoy於大約1269年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德利勒時，她的父親Baudouin de Lannoy30歲，母親Amicie de Wavrin18歲。她和Rogiez De Cuinchy至少有1個女兒。她去世於1319年在法國享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lannoy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: altered form of Flemish Van Oye or Van Hoye (or perhaps an Americanized form of any of their French variants, such as Vanoye, Vannoye, and Vanhoye), a habitational name for someone from a place called with Middle Dutch oye ‘(water) meadow’, as for example Hoye, near Ghent, Belgium. This form of the surname has apparently died out in France. Compare Van Hoy and Vanoy .

History: According to the family tradition, the ancestors of Vannoy family were Huguenots from France who first settled in the Netherlands and later moved to North America. However, their surname is not listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors, nor in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Vanoy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Ancil, Cecile.
American or French: variant of   Vannoy  , a surname of Flemish origin. This surname is virtually non-existing in France.

variants.name: Van Hoy
meanings: American or French (also Vanhoy): variant of Vannoy , a surname of Flemish origin. This surname is very rare in France (Nord).

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie de Lannoy was born about 1269, in Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Baudouin de Lannoy, was 30 and her mother, Amicie de Wavrin, was 18. She had at least 1 daughter with Rogiez De Cuinchy. She died in 1319, in France, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie de Lannoy est née environ 1269, à Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Baudouin de Lannoy, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Amicie de Wavrin, avait 18 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Rogiez De Cuinchy. Elle est décédée en 1319, à France, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie de Lannoy um 1269 in Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baudouin de Lannoy 30 und ihre Mutter Amicie de Wavrin 18. Sie hatte mit Rogiez De Cuinchy mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1319 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Lannoy è nata il circa 1269 nel Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Baudouin de Lannoy, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Amicie de Wavrin, aveva 18 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Rogiez De Cuinchy. Morì nel 1319, nel Francia, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie de Lannoyが約1269年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードリルで生まれた時，父Baudouin de Lannoyは30歳，母Amicie de Wavrinは18歳であった。彼女はRogiez De Cuinchyとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1319年にフランスで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie de Lannoy(이)가 대략 1269년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 릴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baudouin de Lannoy(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Amicie de Wavrin(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 Rogiez De Cuinchy(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1319년 프랑스에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Lannoy nasceu aproximadamente 1269, em Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Baudouin de Lannoy, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Amicie de Wavrin, tinha 18 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Rogiez De Cuinchy. Ela faleceu em 1319, em França, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie de Lannoy родилась около 1269 г. в местности лилл, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Baudouin de Lannoy было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Amicie de Wavrin, 18. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Rogiez De Cuinchy. Она умерла в 1319 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie de Lannoy nació aproximadamente 1269, en Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Baudouin de Lannoy, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Amicie de Wavrin, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Rogiez De Cuinchy. Murió en 1319, en Francia, a la edad de 51 años.
